23 using namespace Arcane;
24 
25 class IDiscreteOperator {
26  public:
28  typedef ItemVectorView StencilType;
29 
31  typedef Real FluxCoeffType;
33  typedef ArrayView<Real> StencilFluxCoeffType;
34 
35  public:
36  virtual ~IDiscreteOperator() {};
37 
38  public:
40  virtual void init() = 0;
50  virtual void prepare(IMesh * mesh,
51  CoefficientArrayT<Cell> * cell_coefficients,
52  CoefficientArrayT<Face> * face_coefficients) = 0;
53 
74  ARCANE_DEPRECATED virtual void prepare(const FaceGroup& internal_faces,
75  const FaceGroup& boundary_faces,
76  FaceGroup& c_internal_faces,
77  FaceGroup& cf_internal_faces,
78  CoefficientArrayT<Cell> * cell_coefficients,
79  CoefficientArrayT<Face> * face_coefficients) = 0;
80 
82  virtual void finalize() = 0;
83 
85  virtual Integer getCellGeometricProperties() = 0;
87  virtual Integer getFaceGeometricProperties() = 0;
88 
89  public:
91  virtual const FaceGroup& faces() const = 0;
93  virtual const CellGroup& cells() const = 0;
95  virtual const FaceGroup& boundaryFaces() const = 0;
97  virtual const FaceGroup& internalFaces() const = 0;
98 };
99 
100 #endif
